stimulus: In 1972, civil rights attorney Maria Reyes co-founded the Coastal Legal Defenders, a community legal ______ that is one of the oldest nonprofit legal aid organizations serving Latina communities in California and that has assisted thousands of families with housing and labor disputes.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The "that is...that has..." relative clauses are essential restrictive modifiers; no punctuation should separate them from "community legal group."

Choice A wrongly uses a comma to separate the noun from its essential restrictive modifier. Choice C wrongly uses a dash for the same. Choice D inserts a coordinating conjunction that creates an awkward fragmented structure.
